name: ai-quality-intelligence-engine
description: A language-agnostic Pre-CI Quality Assistant that analyzes coverage and security reports.

scripts.dashboard: node -e "const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const s=http.createServer((req,res)=>{let f=path.join(__dirname,'dashboard',req.url==='/'?'index.html':req.url);fs.readFile(f,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found');}else{const ext=path.extname(f);const t={'html':'text/html','css':'text/css','js':'text/javascript','json':'application/json'};res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':t[ext.slice(1)]||'text/plain'});res.end(d);}});});s.listen(3000,()=>console.log('Dashboard running at http://localhost:3000'));"

author: AI Quality Engine
